name: cribseekers
description: Backend API for the CribSeekers real estate platform

scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:migrate:status: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate status
scripts.db:push: cd apps/api && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: cd apps/api && npx prisma db seed
